_trn_settings_more_control: Adds more control over the settings of your instances and java.
_trn_concurrent_downloads_text: Select the number of concurrent downloads. If you have a slow connection, select at most 3
_trn_game_resolution_text: Select the game resolution. This will be used to launch the game. Default means the launcher will not specify a value and the game will launch with the default resolution .
_trn_instance_sorting_text: Select the method by which instances should be sorted.
_trn_discord_integration_text: Enable or disable Discord integration. This displays what you are playing in Discord.
_trn_launcher_action_on_game_launch_text: Action to take when launching an instance. Beware that quitting the launcher will prevent it from keeping track of played time.
_trn_show_window_close_warning_title: Show Window Close Warning on Game Launch
_trn_show_window_close_warning_text: Show a warning when closing the window while a game is running.
_trn_potato_mode_text: You got a potato PC? Don't worry! We've got you covered. Enable this and all animations and special effects will be disabled.
_trn_deletion_through_recycle_bin_text: Enable this to move instances to the recycle bin instead of deleting them permanently.
_trn_default_themes_text: You can select one of the default themes for the launcher.
_trn_custom_themes_text: You can craft your own theme by selecting the colors for the different parts of the launcher.
_trn_ads_personalization_text: View and manage how GDLauncher may use your data for ad personalization.
_trn_enable_metrics_text: Select whether or not to enable anonymous metrics and experimental features through feature flags.
_trn_pre_launch_hook_text: Run a script before launching the game. This can be useful for modding or other purposes.
_trn_post_exit_hook_text: Run a script after the game has exited. This can be useful for modding or other purposes.
_trn_wrapper_command_text: Command to run the game. This can be useful for modding or other purposes.
_trn_documents_text: Below you can find some legal documents relevant to the usage of this application.
_trn_instance_tags_text: Create and manage tags to organize your instances
_trn_mod_profiles_text: Save and switch between different mod configurations
_trn_instance_backup_text: Create and restore backups of your instances
_trn_settings_backup_text: Backup and restore your launcher settings
_trn_offline_mode_text: Allow using the launcher without an internet connection
_trn_show_welcome_text: Show the Nokiatis welcome screen on startup
